entry.title: New: BILL061(24) (Honolulu) — PUBLISH
entry.content:
RELATING TO WHEELIES.

Prohibits the performance of wheelies on public streets and roadways by drivers of electric bicycles, mopeds, and motorcycles, except as part of a parade, tournament, or other activity permitted by the city. Defines a “wheelie” as “[a) stunt performed by a person while riding on an electric bicycle, moped, or motorcycle in which the front wheel is raised so that the vehicle is balanced for a moment or longer on its rear wheel or wheels.” Defines “electric bicycle” as “[a] two-wheeled vehicle with handle bars, fully operable pedals, and an electric motor used either to power the vehicle unassisted, or to assist with pedaling.” Defines a “moped” to include an electric bicycle.

Latest action: Final reading notice published in the Honolulu Star-Advertiser.

View on the council site
